core_mechanism: Elimination of a spurious, destabilizing higher-derivative degree of freedom by fine-tuning the coefficients of a perturbative nonlinear (polynomial) interaction expansion order by order to enforce a degeneracy/constraint condition, so that the equations of motion remain second-order and no unstable extra mode propagates.
brief_reason: The abstract states that ghost-like pathologies in the helicity-0 self-interactions and helicity-0/-2 mixing disappear only for special choices of the polynomial interaction coefficients (argued to hold to all orders) and that a change of variables absorbs the mixing to generate the second-order Galileon interactions, i.e. tuned expansion coefficients cancel an unstable propagating mode.
